front: What is single-cell RNA-seq and its relevance to peptide biology?
back: scRNA-seq profiles gene expression in individual cells, revealing heterogeneity in peptide-producing cell populations. Applications: 1) Identify rare peptide-expressing cells, 2) Map peptide expression during development, 3) Characterize tumor microenvironment peptide signals, 4) Discover cell-type-specific peptide isoforms.
